title: Filipino-Style Grilled Lamb Kebabs
description: A flavorful and savory dish made with marinated lamb, perfect for a summer evening. Inspired by Filipino cuisine, this recipe combines the bold flavors of Southeast Asia with the simplicity of grilled meat.

ingredients.name: savory spice blend
ingredients.notes: such as a mixture of garlic powder, onion powder, and paprika

ingredients.name: grilled seasoning
ingredients.notes: such as a mixture of brown sugar, salt, and pepper

ingredients.name: fish sauce
ingredients.notes: adds a salty and umami flavor

instructions: 1. In a large bowl, whisk together savory spice blend, grilled seasoning, fish sauce, and black pepper.
2. Add the sliced lamb to the marinade and mix until coated.
3. Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 2 hours or overnight.
5. Thread the marinated lamb onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
6. Brush the grill with oil to prevent sticking.
7. Grill the lamb skewers for 4-5 minutes per side, or until cooked to desired level of doneness.
8. Wrap each skewer with a lumpia wrapper, securing with a toothpick if necessary.
9. Serve immediately, garnished with crushed black pepper.
